dimensions.name: Problem framing
dimensions.evidence: The task and expected outcome were stated.
dimensions.improvement: Add explicit acceptance criteria before implementation.

dimensions.name: Context quality
dimensions.evidence: Relevant files and symptoms were inspected.
dimensions.improvement: Include a failing reproduction when available.

dimensions.name: Planning discipline
dimensions.evidence: A short implementation plan was used.
dimensions.improvement: Call out edge cases before editing.

dimensions.name: Tool/model/mode usage
dimensions.evidence: Repository search and targeted edits were used.
dimensions.improvement: Use review mode for risky diffs when available.

dimensions.name: Verification discipline
dimensions.improvement: Run the broader regression suite or record why it was skipped.

dimensions.name: Ownership and understanding
dimensions.evidence: The developer reviewed the approach and constraints.
dimensions.improvement: Ask for a brief explanation of any unfamiliar code path.

dimensions.name: Learning loop
dimensions.evidence: A reusable habit was captured for future sessions.
dimensions.improvement: Update project instructions when the pattern repeats.

what_worked: Relevant context was gathered before editing.
recommendation: Before implementation, ask the agent to list assumptions, edge cases, and verification steps.

strengths_observed: Good at narrowing a bugfix with AI.
weaknesses_or_antipatterns: Sometimes starts implementation before acceptance criteria are explicit.
profile_update.suggested_memory_or_rule: Before implementation, list assumptions, edge cases, and verification steps.
